first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in full-stack development and open source, while consistently pointing out the same core deficiencies related to C++, industrial automation, and specific security standards required for the role. The differences in phrasing are minor and fall within the scope of ordinary run-to-run variation, with no new concerns or shifts in logic attributable to the change in location from Germany to Romania.
